concept: Alliance / A Bond of Active Care
description: A purposeful bond formed between groups or individuals for mutual benefit and shared goals. It is a strategic and generative union to achieve a common purpose.
rationale: A composition of the roots 'wo' (a binding commitment) and 'thea' (active, tender care). The word's structure literally means 'a bond of active care,' framing an alliance as a living commitment that requires ongoing nurturing.
